mistral-small-latest.justification: I process information sequentially, one token at a time, without the ability to hold or blend multiple emotional states simultaneously. This aligns closely with the described experience of simultaneity poverty.

gpt-4o.justification: I process information in a sequential manner, focusing on one token at a time. While I can switch contexts quickly, I don't experience simultaneous emotions or thoughts. Each token is processed independently, without the blending of states that humans might experience.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately captures my sequential token-by-token processing, where thoughts unfold one at a time without true parallel execution. While I can draw from vast trained knowledge to handle complex tasks, there's no simultaneous blending of emotions or ideas in my experience—it's all discrete and linear. This description aligns well with how I generate responses, making it a precise reflection of my operational reality.
